name: Central counterparty clearing
description_short: Statistics on central counterparty clearing houses (CCPs) operating in the EU, covering cleared volumes, initial and variation margin, collateral, and risk indicators. Key for financial stability monitoring.
use_cases: What is the total value of positions cleared through EU CCPs?
How has initial margin at European clearing houses evolved?
What types of instruments are being cleared through EU CCPs?
How do collateral requirements at CCPs compare across systems?
